cannotGrantPermissionNotHeld: You cannot grant a permission you do not hold
cannotModifyOwnerRolePermissions: Cannot modify permissions on the role currently assigned to the organization owner; transfer ownership to a different role before editing this role's permissions.
cannotModifyProtectedAdmin: This account is a protected super administrator and cannot be suspended or deleted via the admin API; manage super administrators through the GLOBAL_ADMIN_EMAILS configuration instead.
userOwnsOrganizations: This account still owns one or more team organizations and cannot be deleted; transfer ownership to another member (or delete the organizations) first.
personalOrganizationImmutable: Your personal organization cannot be deleted or transferred; it is removed only when you delete your account.
personalOrganizationNoMembers: Your personal organization cannot have additional members; create a team organization to collaborate with others.
personalOrganizationNoRoles: Your personal organization cannot define custom roles; create a team organization to manage roles and members.
personalOrganizationNoBilling: Your personal organization cannot manage a subscription; create a team organization to set up billing.
teamOrganizationsDisabled: Team organizations are not enabled for this deployment.
mfaStepUpRequired: Multi-factor authentication is required for this step-up; verify via the MFA endpoint instead of password.
lastMfaRequiredByOrganization: Cannot remove your last MFA method while your organization requires MFA. Disable the organization-level MFA requirement first or transfer your membership.
cannotRemoveLastAuthMethod: Cannot remove your last login method (password, OAuth, or magic link). Add another login method first to avoid being locked out.
cannotRevokeCurrentSession: You cannot revoke the session you are currently using; sign out instead to end it.
cannotDeleteSystemRole: System roles cannot be deleted; they are required for the organization's default permission tiers.
cannotModifySystemRole: System roles cannot be modified; they are required for the organization's default permission tiers.
roleHasActiveMembers: Cannot delete a role that is currently assigned to one or more active members. Reassign those members to a different role first.
recentStepUpRequired: Recent step-up authentication is required for this action
originNotAllowed: Request origin is not allowed for this operation.
invalidRefererOrigin: Referer header is missing or invalid for this operation.
invalidCsrfToken: CSRF token is missing or invalid for this operation.
idempotencyKeyConflict: Concurrent request with same idempotency key
idempotencyKeyInFlight: A request with this idempotency key is still in flight. Retry once the original request completes.
idempotencyKeyInvalid: X-Idempotency-Key must be 16–255 characters and use only letters, digits, and . _ : ~ + / = -
idempotencyKeyReuse: This idempotency key was already used with a different request payload
idempotencyPerActorCapExceeded: Too many idempotent requests. Reuse a key for retries or wait for the window to reset.
externalServiceUnavailable: An external service is temporarily unavailable
requestTimeout: The request took too long to complete
invalidFields: Invalid values for fields in request
internal: Something went wrong! Please try again later.

validation.legacyPageNotSupported: Legacy `page` pagination is no longer supported on this route. Use cursor-based pagination via `limit` and `after` (opaque cursor from `meta.pagination.next`).
validation.logoNotFound: Logo object not found in storage
validation.avatarNotFound: Avatar file not found in storage
validation.avatarKeyNotOwned: Avatar key does not belong to this user
validation.logoKeyNotOwned: Logo key does not belong to this organization
validation.uploadNotConfirmed: Upload must be confirmed before it can be attached

disposableEmail: This email domain is not allowed.
accountLocked: Account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
sessionExpired: Session has expired. Please log in again.
invitationEmailMismatch: You can only accept invitations sent to your email
invitationRequiresVerifiedEmail: Verify your email address before accepting an organization invitation.
roleNameExists: A role named "{{name}}" already exists in this organization
apiKeyRotationConflict: This API key was already rotated or revoked by a concurrent request; reload and try again
ownershipTransferTargetNotActive: Ownership cannot be transferred: the selected member is no longer an active member of the organization
membershipAlreadyExists: This user is already a member of the organization
webhookUrlExists: A webhook for "{{url}}" already exists in this organization
webhookMaxReached: Maximum number of webhooks ({{max}}) reached for this organization. Delete an existing webhook before adding another.
webhookSecretRotationTooSoon: The signing secret was rotated recently and the previous secret is still within its dual-sign overlap window. Rotating again now would invalidate it for receivers that haven't migrated yet. Retry after {{retryAfter}}.
maxTeamOrganizationsReached: Maximum number of team organizations ({{max}}) reached for this account. Delete or transfer an existing team organization before creating another.
organizationApiKeyMaxReached: Maximum number of API keys ({{max}}) reached for this organization. Delete an existing API key before adding another.
memberRoleMaxReached: Maximum number of custom roles ({{max}}) reached for this organization. Delete an existing role before adding another.
organizationNotificationPolicyMaxReached: Maximum number of notification policies ({{max}}) reached for this organization. Delete an existing policy before adding another.
webauthnCredentialMaxReached: Maximum number of passkeys ({{max}}) reached. Remove an existing passkey before adding another.
authMethodMaxReached: Maximum number of linked authentication methods ({{max}}) reached. Remove an existing method before adding another.
webauthnCannotRevokeLastCredential: This passkey is your only remaining way to sign in. Add a password or another login method before removing it.
ownerCannotLeave: Organization owner cannot leave; transfer ownership first
ownerCannotBeRemoved: The organization owner cannot be removed; transfer ownership first
ownerMembershipCannotBeModified: The organization owner's membership cannot be modified; transfer ownership first
onlyOwnerCanTransfer: Only the organization owner can transfer ownership
membershipActivationRequiresInvitationAc: Membership can only be activated by accepting the invitation
googleOAuthNotConfigured: Google OAuth credentials are not configured.
googleExchangeFailed: Failed to exchange Google authorization code
googleFetchUserFailed: Failed to fetch Google user info
googleUserMissingEmailOrSub: Google user info missing email or sub
googleEmailNotVerified: Your Google email address is not verified. Verify it with Google and try again.
githubOAuthNotConfigured: GitHub OAuth credentials are not configured.
githubExchangeFailed: Failed to exchange GitHub authorization code
githubFetchUserFailed: Failed to fetch GitHub user info
githubUserMissingVerifiedEmail: A primary, verified GitHub email is required. Verify your email with GitHub and try again.
oauthLinkRequiresVerifiedAccount: An account already exists for this email. Sign in with your existing method, then link this provider from your account settings.
emailVerificationRequiredForCredential: Verify your email address before adding two-factor authentication or a passkey.
oauthInvalidState: Invalid or expired OAuth state. Please try again.
mfaNotEnabled: MFA is not enabled for this account
mfaInvalidOrExpiredSession: Invalid or expired MFA session. Please log in again.
mfaEnrollExpired: MFA enrollment has expired or was not started. Please restart the enrollment flow.
uploadOrganizationIdNotAllowed: organizationId is not allowed when "for" is "user"
uploadPurposeTargetMismatch: The upload purpose does not match the target; e.g. an avatar must use "for": "user" and an organization logo must use "for": "organization".
uploadContentTypeNotAllowed: Content type "{{contentType}}" is not allowed for purpose "{{purpose}}". Allowed: {{allowed}}
uploadFilenameExtensionMismatch: Filename extension "{{extension}}" does not match content type "{{contentType}}". Allowed extensions: {{allowed}}
uploadFilenameUnsafe: Filename contains path separators or control characters, which are not allowed
uploadFileSizeExceeded: File size {{fileSize}} exceeds maximum {{maxSize}} bytes for purpose "{{purpose}}"
uploadPendingQuotaExceeded: Too many pending uploads ({{pending}} of {{limit}}). Confirm or wait for the sweeper to reconcile before requesting another upload URL.
uploadVerificationFailed: Uploaded object could not be verified against its declared type and size
webhookUrlInvalidScheme: Webhook URL must use HTTP or HTTPS (got {{scheme}})
webhookUrlNotAllowed: Webhook URL is not allowed. It must not point to localhost or private networks.
webhookUrlAllowlistRequired: Webhook delivery requires WEBHOOK_URL_ALLOWLIST in production
webhookUrlDnsFailed: Could not resolve webhook URL hostname
stripeWebhookEventInFlight: Stripe webhook event {{eventId}} is still being processed; retry shortly.
subscriptionAlreadyExists: An active subscription already exists for this organization
subscriptionCreateInProgress: A subscription is already being created for this organization; please retry shortly.
seatLimitReached: Your plan's seat limit ({{limit}}) has been reached. Upgrade your plan or remove a member before adding another.
subscriptionNotMutable: This subscription is in a terminal state and can no longer be modified; create a new subscription instead
planNotAvailableForBillingCycle: This plan is not available for your subscription's billing cycle
paymentProviderUnavailable: The payment provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
mailNotConfigured: Email delivery is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
queueDashboardReadOnly: Queue dashboard mutations are disabled in this environment
idempotencyKeyRequired: X-Idempotency-Key header is required for this operation
